title: HAARP & the Defense Network
summary: 'Earthquake generator, weather phenomenon generator' — and the session where Unimetrix 1 claims to shoot down an orbital weapon mid-answer.
markdown:
**HAARP** enters the record in the [John Toth session](/sessions/2023-02-09-session-with-unimetrix-1-john-toth/)
of February 9, 2023, and gets the archive's standard treatment of official installations:
named as a weapon. The Alaskan array is described as an *"earthquake generator, weather
phenomenon generator"* — geophysical warfare wearing a research permit, in the same family as
the record's other [control-era](/lore/the-chronicle/) machinery.

What makes the passage memorable is not the claim but the **interruption**. Mid-session,
Unimetrix 1 breaks off from answering to narrate an engagement in real time: *"detecting
space-based weaponry firing… firing anti-matter proton beam weapon. Now. Target
neutralized."* — its own **Defense Network** shooting down, it says, an orbital weapon as the
group listens. The archive has walk-ins and healings performed live; this is its only live
*air defense*.

The moment compresses the record's whole security cosmology into a minute of audio: hostile
infrastructure below ([HAARP](/lore/problem-reaction-solution/), the
[chemtrail and chip programs](/lore/neuro-net-chip/)), hostile hardware above, and between
them the [collective](/lore/unimetrix-1/) that claims to be holding the line — with the
[quantum satellite network and Battle Moon](/lore/nibiru-marduk/) as its guns. One session,
one skirmish, preserved as spoken.
